title: pleopeltis × leucospora
intro: Pleopeltis × leucospora, also known as the Polypodium leucosporum, is a hybrid species of fern within the family Polypodiaceae. It is primarily recognized for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis × leucospora include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, it has been prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
